prestazioni: F5 Turbocharged CA18DET (2.0L DOHC 16V) with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and Tomei 260° cams for 320+ hp at 1.5 bar boost on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing sequential injection and individual cylinder trims

Full billet CA18DET stroker kit (88mm crank, 87mm forged pistons, H-beam rods) paired with a Tomei Type-S 75mm throttle body, N1 oil pump, and Koyorad 4-core front-mount intercooler with custom piping for sustained power under 30-minute track sessions

Custom 6-speed dog engagement transmission with OS Giken twin-plate clutch, Cusco 1.5-way LSD, and Nismo 4.11:1 final drive ratio, reinforced with a Pivot Racing transmission brace and polyurethane engine mounts to handle the torque spike
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (S12-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, extended 20mm front and 30mm rear, paired with Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 (front) and 16x10.5 +25 (rear) wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/45/16 and 265/40/16 tires

Custom 3-piece carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts feeding the intercooler, matched with a Veilside Fortune front bumper (S12 conversion) and custom LED projector headlights with Hella 500 driving lights in the lower grille

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (S12-specific mounting brackets), Takata 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel, and a custom half-cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) painted Nissan Racing Blue (426) with matching door cards and rear seat delete
